title: CacheBlend: Fast Large Language Model Serving for RAG with Cached Knowledge Fusion
authors: Jiayi Yao, Hanchen Li, Yuhan Liu, Siddhant Ray, Yihua Cheng, Qizheng Zhang, Kuntai Du, Shan Lu, Junchen Jiang
venue: EuroSys 2025 (Twentieth European Conference on Computer Systems), pp. 94-109
tables_figures_checked: Figure 6 (重算比例 vs attention 偏差)
Figure 16 (r*=15% 的质量-比例依据, 引自 §5.1)
overlap_reason: 机制家族相同(选择性 token 重算 + 以 full prefill 为质量基准), 但触发条件是 chunk 重组合缺失 cross-attention, 不是外部状态 mutation; chunk 内容假定不可变, 无 stale 修复、无 receiver/task/stage 条件化
unresolved_questions: §7 实验节逐表数字未展开(HTML 读到 §6 末); Figure 16 原文未直接核到图形内容, r*=15% 引自 §5.1 文本

title: KVPR: Efficient LLM Inference with I/O-Aware KV Cache Partial Recomputation
authors: Chaoyi Jiang, Lei Gao (equal contribution), Hossein Entezari Zarch, Murali Annavaram
tables_figures_checked: Appendix A.1 调度 (经检索片段)
§4 数字引自摘要/引言 (延迟 -35.8%, 吞吐 +46.2%)
overlap_reason: 共用 partial recomputation 手段, 但目的是用 GPU 重算掩盖 PCIe 传输(offload 场景), 注意力精确无近似; 重算集合由带宽/算力决定, 与 mutation/失效语义无关
unresolved_questions: ACL Anthology 精确条目号/DOI 未核对; §4 实验表未逐表展开

title: dKV-Cache: The Cache for Diffusion Language Models
authors: Xinyin Ma, Runpeng Yu, Gongfan Fang, Xinchao Wang
tables_figures_checked: 官方仓库 README (pipeline 图, benchmark 结果表图片, Dream/LLaDA 用法)
overlap_reason: 按 token 表示稳定性选择缓存/刷新, 直觉相似, 但触发是扩散解码内部步间动态而非外部 mutation, 模型范式不同(DLM 非 AR), Greedy 变体明确有损

title: Prompt Cache: Modular Attention Reuse for Low-Latency Inference
authors: In Gim, Guojun Chen, Seung-seob Lee, Nikhil Sarda, Anurag Khandelwal, Lin Zhong
tables_figures_checked: 官方仓库 README (PML schema, demo TTFT 286.9ms->78.2ms, LongBench 评测脚本)
overlap_reason: 模块化 attention 复用但不做任何重算修复(full KV reuse 路线); 是 C4 的对照基线而非撞车; 非前缀复用的 cross-attention 损失由 CacheBlend 论文 §3.3 明确指出
unresolved_questions: 论文全文未取得, 内部表号未知; PML schema 在任意 mutation 下的行为未评估(超出其设计目标)

title: DroidSpeak: KV Cache Sharing for Cross-LLM Communication and Multi-LLM Serving (NSDI 版更名: DroidSpeak: KV Cache Sharing Across Fine-tuned Model Variants)
authors: Yuhan Liu, Yuyang Huang, Jiayi Yao, Shaoting Feng, Zhuohan Gu, Kuntai Du, Hanchen Li, Yihua Cheng, Junchen Jiang, Shan Lu, Madan Musuvathi, Esha Choukse
tables_figures_checked: abs (4x 吞吐, 3.1x prefill, 质量损失可忽略)
arXiv v4 模型对 benchmark 构建描述(检索片段)
NSDI26 会议 PDF §8 conclusion(检索片段)
overlap_reason: 唯一覆盖 receiver-conditioned 选择性重算的证据(接收方为同架构不同微调模型, 重算少数层); 但粒度是 layer 非受影响 token/span, 触发是模型身份变化而非外部状态 mutation, 无 agent stage
unresolved_questions: 公开代码未找到(MSR 页面有 Project 链接未确认); 全文未取得, 层选择的敏感性分析细节未知; NSDI 版与 arXiv v4 的差异未知

title: Models Take Notes at Prefill: KV Cache Can Be Editable and Composable
authors: Bojie Li (第一作者/提交者; 完整作者列表未从页面提取)
tables_figures_checked: Figure 2 (editing landscape: stale/field-only/CacheBlend 失败 vs erratum P=1.00; CoT 0/1 分裂)
§7 用户记忆 (LoCoMo, transplant ≡ full recompute)
§9 vLLM 在线 (98.5% vs 1% 命中, p90 TTFT -53~398x)
overlap_reason: 外部 field mutation -> 因果识别受影响区域(下游 note token) -> erratum/field+selective@K/suffix 重算三档修复, 正确性标准 decision-identical to full recompute; agent 场景(τ²-bench, 轨迹中途状态变更); 并实证 CacheBlend 式选择器在 mutation 修复中失效; 含部分边界刻画(CoT 门控, K* 模型依赖)
unresolved_questions: 完整作者列表与单位未确认; 无公开代码证据; 仅覆盖字段值变更一类 mutation; receiver 变化不在编辑场景内; §5 后(compose 细节/附录)未逐节核读

title: KEEP: A KV-Cache-Centric Memory Management System for Efficient Embodied Planning
authors: Zebin Yang (提交者; 完整作者列表未从页面提取)
tables_figures_checked: abs (ALFRED 2.68x 加速; vs CacheBlend 成功率 +4.13%, TTFT -1.90x)
§3 片段 (KV 复用三分法: prefix caching / full KV reuse / KV recomputation)
overlap_reason: 覆盖 agent(具身规划)场景记忆 mutation 后的选择性重算(static/dynamic 分组 + multi-hop 组间 cross-attention 重建), 直接以 CacheBlend 为基线并胜出; 但粒度为启发式 memory group, 正确性非 ≡ from-scratch, 无修复边界刻画、无 receiver 轴
unresolved_questions: 完整作者列表未确认; 代码 URL 未从摘要提取; 全文未取得, multi-hop 重算的触发条件与开销细节未知
